sections.instruction: Use the standard nav when the template needs the clearest service, area, phone, and booking paths.
sections.name: Primary navigation

sections.instruction: Use h1, one primary booking CTA, one services CTA, and three compact trust stats beside a full-bleed image column.
sections.name: Split content and full image

sections.instruction: Use short repeated claims when there are many small proof points.
sections.name: Trust marquee

sections.instruction: Use 6-9 bento-style service cards for a fuller service scan. The fixed layout rhythm is big small small, small small big, then big small small.
sections.name: Services bento cards

sections.instruction: Use two large three-column decision cards with a simple left-aligned header and link above them.
sections.name: Split large cards

sections.instruction: Use stacked feature cards when a why-choose-us section needs larger icon-led proof points with the same copy formula as asymmetric cards.
sections.name: Stacked feature cards

sections.instruction: Use when visitors need to confirm service coverage before starting a request.
sections.name: Service area zip lookup

sections.instruction: Use current process steps when the page needs a clearer, more styled decision sequence.
sections.name: Process steps

sections.instruction: Handle objections with expandable answers and no vague copy.
sections.name: FAQ accordion

sections.instruction: Use a fixed-cover fade as an immersive, image-led closing conversion. Write backgroundTitle and backgroundBody for the full-screen closing message, then foregroundEyebrow, foregroundTitle, foregroundBody, and contactDetails for the request path. Do not leave backgroundTitle or backgroundBody blank.
sections.name: Fixed cover fade

sections.instruction: End with top-level navigation links, a rule, contact info, social links, and legal links in a compact footer.
sections.name: Condensed footer
